scripts.build: tsx -e "import { buildSync } from 'esbuild'; buildSync({ entryPoints: ['src/orchestrator.ts'], bundle: true, platform: 'node', target: 'node20', outfile: 'dist/orchestrator.js' })"
scripts.format: biome format --write package.json tsconfig.json src tests
scripts.lint: biome lint package.json tsconfig.json src tests
scripts.check:merge-conflicts: git fetch origin main && git merge-tree --write-tree origin/main HEAD >/dev/null
